=== Txt Infos Set List.txt
===================
===================
===================
Roy Orbison Tribute
Los Angeles, California
Universal Amphitheater
24 February 1990
 
Stereo audience recording
 
1.     Mr. Tambourine Man
2.     He Was A Friend Of Mine (trad., registered as Bob Dylan)
3.     Only The Lonely (Roy Orbison/Joe Melson)
 
 
1, 3  Bob Dylan (guitar & shared vocals).
 
2  Bob Dylan (guitar).
 
1-3  Roger McGuinn (guitar & shared vocals), David Crosby 
(guitar & shared vocals), Chris Hillman (bass & shared vocals), 
John Jorgenson (guitar), Steve Duncan (drums).
 
3  Cindy Bullens, Gary Busey, Joe Ely, Chris Frantz, John Fogerty, Larry Gatlin, Emmylou Harris, Jerry Harrison, Levon Helm, John Hiatt, John Lee Hooker, Chris Isaak, Booker T, B. B. King, Al Kooper, Michael McDonald, Slim Jim Phantom, Iggy Pop, Bonnie Raitt, Lee Rocker, Brian Setzer, Ricky Skaggs, Harry Dean Stanton, Syd Straw, Don Was, David Was, Tina Weymouth, Dwight Yoakam and others (shared vocals).
 
1, part of 3 broadcast by Showtime Television Network, May 6 1990 and later.
 
2 partly broadcast by MTV, June 1990 in the program "Week In Rock".
 
1 released on the four CD set THE BYRDS, COLUMBIA RECORDS, C4T/C4K 46773, 23 October 1990.
 
1 stereo PA recording.
 
2, 3 partly mono TV broadcast.
 
Stereo audience recording.

Source/Linage:
[Audio ? generation] > DAT Clone(s) > Sony DAT Deck DTC-59 ES > 
Marantz PMD 670 Professional > Kingston 2.0 GB Compact Flash Card 
(record as wave) > Peak Pro 4 (sector boundaries) > Xact 1.4 > FLACs
